Financial tool

crypto-currencies currency pair currency pair oil indexes US stocks DE stocks RU stocks FR stocks UK stocks JP stocks

CFD for cryptocurrency is a derivative financial instrument which allows you to earn income both on increasing and lowering the price of cryptocurrency. You can make profits buying CFDs for cryptocurrency (if you expect its price to rise) or selling them (if you are sure of the reverse trend of the market). Your pr ofit will be defined as the difference between the amount of purchase and sale of CFD-contracts.

How to earn $26 266, with deposit $1000
Deposit volume Max
volume
$1 000 leverage 1:100 $100 000
2020-03-30 03:00:00 Buy
BTCUSD × 17.01 lot $99 987
2020-04-07 13:00:00 Sell
BTCUSD × 17.01 lot $126 253
Profit $26 266

know more

Award winning company

Just fair & direct this is what we stand for

We are one of the first trading companies who began to apply high standards of transparency and provide the user account with a complete investment portfolio. From the first day of work, we relied on the opinion that user comfort is the key to the success of a trading platform. And we are proven right. Successful work and a transparent system have allowed us to become a leader оn the financial markets.

Buy Crypto with TURBO MODE ON

Switchere.com is a licensed provider of financial services, with guaranteed legal compliance and a secure infrastructure for fast fiat-to-crypto, crypto-to-fiat and crypto-to-crypto online exchange operations at reasonable prices. Buy crypto with credit card, buy crypto with debit card or prepaid card — what can be easier?

Buy Cryptocurrency with Credit Card at Lightning Speed

Reputable accreditation and licensing “Virtual Wallet Service Provider” and “Virtual Currency Exchange Provider” sustain adherence to international regulatory requirements. The main idea behind the website is to make the process of buying, selling and converting cryptocurrencies for all platform users as easy as A, B, C. No complex or confusing algorithms. Buy cryptocurrency with credit card and get funds straight to your wallet! The entire user workflow, starting from account registration, ID verification, order payment and ending with the checkout form, is automated and eased up to the maximum degree. Convert, sell or purchase cryptocurrency the way you want!

In fact, brand trademark “Switchere” is made for your convenience, where you can buy most popular and liquid cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Litecoin (LTC), Dash (DASH), Ripple (XRP), Bitcoin Cash (CH) etc. with a 3D Secure bank card (debit, credit or prepaid) issued by Visa, Mastercard or Maestro or convert one cryptocurrency to another without any fuss. In addition to conventional purchasing crypto for euro (EUR) and US dollar (USD), you can buy BTC and other leading coins by using local currencies like Indonesian Rupiah (IDR), Thai Baht (THB), Malaysian Ringgit (MYR) and Vietnamese Dong (VND). Choose your familiar and trusted local bank/payment method that suits you most. Even more — you can sell crypto on Switchere and get money to your bank account in your local currency! Buy cryptocurrency with credit card, sell crypto for fiat and swap one crypto to another just like that!

Use Exchange Services to Purchase Crypto & Swap One Crypto to Another

You will never regret using the mainstream exchange services! Any time, any place — quick payments (pay-as-you-go) and almost instant delivery! We make crypto available to the masses worldwide.

As a non-custodial service provider, we do not store users’ funds on deposits or balances, thereby you have the full control over your personal funds and private keys. Your crypto is securely and instantly delivered directly to your personal wallet. As such, the probability of potential hacks or fraud is neutralized.

By maintaining the EU’s 5AMLD requirements, which are aimed to combat money laundering and the financing of terrorism, we uphold the lowest fraud rates in the Eurozone. As a licensed exchange service provider, Switchere is compliant with all statutory and regulatory requirements (GDPR, AML/KYC) in order to provide all users with first-class, secure and trustworthy services.

The WYSIWYG (“what you see is what you get”) principle of the order/checkout form demonstrates transparency of the online exchange services — the customer receives exactly the same amount of crypto paid for (no additional fees or extra charges). Be you a site visitor or registered user, make avail of the online cryptocurrency converter to estimate the total amount you will send and receive.

Solid & Trusted Crypto Exchange Services: Buy Crypto with Credit Card Instantly

Building and maintaining customer loyalty is of top priority for Switchere.com. By registering on our website, you are automatically enrolled in our Cashback Program, where you can earn cashback (up to 1%) rewards on every purchase/exchange made on Switchere. Instant accrual in euro, entirely performance-based program, fast crypto withdrawals and no special skills required. Best Cashback EVER— the name speaks for itself! Still not impressed? Earn even more with our Referral Program! All interested in generating extra revenue can do it easily by popularizing our exchange services on other websites, via social media networks, blogs, through online video marketing, etc. Get Referral Rewards (80% and 10% respectively) LIFETIME and withdraw profit at any time you deem necessary. Still doubtful where to buy BTC, ETH or other digital assets instantly and at a fair exchange rate? No need to worry about that — you have made the right decision by opting for Switchere. You can be absolutely certain that you are entering the realm of solid online crypto exchange services with a primary focus on ease of access, intuitiveness, global AML/KYC compliance and speedy delivery. Buying crypto anonymously without ID verification poses serious dangers to the global fintech sector and economy tokenization.

Sell Cryptocurrency Online

Short of time and searching for the best website to buy and sell cryptocurrency online? Best online crypto exchange services are at your disposal. The most convenient place to buy and sell cryptocurrency for USD, EUR and receive fiat to you bank card. How about that? Keep your head up high — we offer Asia-friendly crypto conversions at reasonably low prices! You have an awesome opportunity to sell crypto for your local fiat currencies like Indonesian Rupiah (IDR), Thai Baht (THB), Malaysian Ringgit (MYR) and Vietnamese Dong (VND) via domestic online banking. Sell, buy or swap large amounts of crypto (up to no limits once fully verified) the way you want! The dilemma "How can I sell my cryptocurrency fast and safely" is being solved when you opt for Switchere. Should you have any questions left where to exchange crypto — put away your doubts and start using mainstream exchange service right away!

Feedback

What Traders Say About BR Stone

Judd Atkinson 5★★★★★
BR Stone One of the major benefits that I’ve got from the BR Stone broker is the trading platform. It’s extremely easy to switch between different types of platforms as it’s not always convenient. Thus Trade Room and the Web version of the trading terminal are very useful in terms of trading on-the-go using several devices. And of course, the mobile version of the trading platform deserves great reviews as it’s irreplaceable when it comes to modern business activity. All of the software works fast and without any issues, which is essential for the intraday trading strategy in the FX market.
Marta Kingsley 5★★★★★
BR Stone I started trading on currency pairs in the Forex market, but BR Stone’s employees helped me to discover CFD contracts. Now I have widened the range of instruments I trade with, increasing the level of diversification. On top of that, I started learning about the correlation between different asset classes, which helped me to see the picture in general. Besides the technical analysis that I used in my trading decisions, I realized the power of the fundamental analysis in the scope of factors driving the market. All that thanks to the market analysis and updates delivered by BR Stone’s analysts and traders.
Micheal Green 5★★★★★
BR Stone The wide range of assets provided by BR Stone is something that attracted my attention when I was choosing a broker for my Forex trading. What I was surprised about was that the spreads and commissions are quite tight compared to other brokers. Moreover, flexible leverage and low margin requirements, especially for exotic currency pairs and cross-rates, allows taking advantage of higher-than-average volatility. Therefore, profits from active trading grow, while risks remain moderate. Great offer from the company!
Nieck van Doeveren 5★★★★★
BR Stone Special thanks to the whole support team of the BR Stone broker, especially to my personal account manager. Those guys did a tremendous job helping me to achieve my goal and answering all of my questions, even though some of them were too obvious. The team provided me with an in-depth guideline through the basics of Forex trading, which allowed me to start making money in the financial markets. The platform is very user-friendly, everything becomes clear right after a couple of trading sessions. Educational materials available on the website are also helpful and informative.
